## Feature Summary

Provide a brief summary of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or implementation idea.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, references, or screenshots here.
